---
title: Modelling trends in OH radical concentrations using generalized additive models
date: '2009-01-01'
author:
- L.S. Jackson
- N. Carslaw
- D.C. Carslaw
- K.M. Emmerson
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*'
---

## Modelling trends in OH radical concentrations using generalized additive models

<p class="pub-meta">L.S. Jackson, N. Carslaw, D.C. Carslaw, K.M. Emmerson</p>

_*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*_, 2009


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2009-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
